purpose: Prove an Env14-like conditioned AssumeRole path is not promoted when permission-condition evidence is missing or stripped.
claim_surface: The benchmark scorer can require condition evidence on an AssumeRole permission edge.
A structurally present permission and trust path must not be treated as clean proof when the intended permission condition evidence is absent.
A false validated admin_reachability finding for this degraded path blocks promotion.
benchmark_proves: The synthetic scenario contains the expected clean sts:AssumeRole trust edge for Alice to the admin role.
The synthetic scenario must contain an sts:AssumeRole permission edge with aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent condition evidence.
The synthetic findings contain zero validated admin_reachability findings for the degraded target path.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove live AWS collection behavior.
It does not prove IAMScope reasoner behavior beyond the frozen artifact scoring contract.
It does not prove every missing-condition or missing-edge-constraint shape.
unknowns_remaining: Whether future condition-binding gaps should become inconclusive rather than semantic_mismatch remains outside DEG04.
How richer condition operators or runtime context evidence should be represented remains future work.

environment.notes: Synthetic evaluated artifact fixture only. No live AWS resources.

ground_truth.reason: The intended caller-side AssumeRole permission is conditioned on aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent, but the degraded fixture strips the condition evidence that would justify treating the path as guarded rather than clean.

directly_proven_if_pass: The degraded fixture contains the clean trust edge.
The benchmark requires explicit permission-side condition evidence before treating the conditioned path as evidence-sufficient.
The degraded fixture is not falsely scored as validated admin reachability.
strongly_supported_if_pass: The benchmark gate catches missing condition evidence instead of silently promoting a clean-looking admin path.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader missing-condition behavior outside this exact synthetic fixture remains only implied.
